events.query: Anthropic Mythos Glasswing dangerous capability gated 2026
events.title: Anthropic Unveils 'Project Glasswing' as Claude Mythos Targets ...
events.content: Mythos Preview has already found thousands of high-severity vulnerabilities, including some in every major operating system and web browser. Given the rate of AI progress, it will not be long before such capabilities proliferate, potentially beyond actors who are committed to deploying them safely. The fallout—for economies, public safety, and national security—could be severe. Project Glasswing is an urgent attempt to put these capabilities to work for defensive purposes. [...] Anthropic Unveil

tags.owner_note: Tavily AI — aggregates web, inherits all web biases

events.query: Anthropic Mythos Glasswing dangerous capability gated 2026
events.title: Open Source, After Mythos
events.content:
AI is crossing that threshold now.

Anthropic's limited preview of Claude Mythos brings that reality into sharper focus. The company says the model can discover and exploit software vulnerabilities at a level that few human experts can match, and it has launched a gated initiative, Project Glasswing, to put those capabilities into defenders' hands first. What matters most is not just the model itself, but what it signals: AI is no longer just a tool people experiment with. It is becoming embedde
